title: useLocale
description: Global reactive locale switcher. All callers share the same state, so changing the locale updates the entire application. Pass the reactive locale object directly to ModoProvider :locale.

api.locale: Reactive `ModoLocale` object — pass directly to ModoProvider :locale.

playground.note: Changing the locale here updates all translated content in the showroom.

provider.title: With ModoProvider
provider.desc: Bind the reactive locale to ModoProvider so child components re-render with translated strings.
provider.body: The locale object is reactive. Pass it to ModoProvider and all descendants react to changes.
